fields.title: Rewire agents, prompts, and planning language to backlog
fields.description: Make tau's autonomous workflows and plan mode use backlog consistently instead of Beads.
fields.design: Update mode-agent tool lists, startup validation, worker instructions, and prompt markdown files so smart, deep, rush, and plan all reference backlog. Replace formalize-into-beads language with backlog-backed planning language and have workers inspect tasks with backlog show <id>.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Worker and mode-agent tool allowlists include backlog instead of bd. Worker instructions tell agents to inspect tasks with backlog show <id>. Tau-owned prompt markdown no longer references Beads as the planning system. Startup validation passes with backlog as the registered planning tool.
